reviews.review_description: I gave a 3 because seems to work ok but first question they asked is how much do YOU want to spend. Many free apps do the same job.

reviews.review_title: A nice surprise at Meta Store
reviews.review_description:
As a Perplexity Pro user, I'm happy to be able to use AI in the Quest native app. 
I don't have Quest Meta AI in my region, and since I also use the Quest 3 for productivity, it's great that I have access to all my AI conversations.
